summary: Jeremiah warns Judah of impending destruction due to covenant betrayal while announcing the promise of a new covenant written on the heart.
historical_context: Jeremiah prophesied during the final years of Judah before the Babylonian exile. His ministry reflects profound personal suffering and resistance while delivering divine warnings.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Jeremiah reflects the consequences of rejecting covenant truth.
mirror_water_fire.water: Calls to repentance attempt to cleanse a hardened nation.
mirror_water_fire.fire: The promise of a new covenant transforms despair into future hope.
